entry.data:
SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH, BECOMING WEST 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST IN THE AFTERNOON

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

RAIN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SNOW SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LITTLE OR NO SNOW ACCUMULATION
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
BRISK AND MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 30S

MOSTLY CLEAR
COLD WITH LOWS AROUND 15

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 20S
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
